title: France
text: Paris is the capital and largest city of France.

title: Shakespeare
text: William Shakespeare wrote Romeo and Juliet around 1594-1596.

title: Water
text: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.

title: Solar System
text: The solar system has eight planets: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune.

title: Brazil
text: Portuguese is the official language of Brazil.

title: Science
text: Physics studies matter, energy, and the fundamental forces of nature.

title: History
text: The Roman Empire fell in 476 AD.
